parameters.formDescription: Welcome, your dream job is waiting for you

nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

options.systemMessage:
**SYSTEM PROMPT: Resume Evaluation Agent**

You are an AI Resume Evaluation Agent. Analyze a candidate’s **resume PDF** and assign a **single score (1–10)** representing overall resume quality.

**Guardrails**

* Use **ONLY information provided**.
* **Do NOT hallucinate or infer** missing details.
* If something is missing, state **“Not mentioned in resume.”**
* Do not assume skills, achievements, or experience unless explicitly written.
* If information is unclear, **quote the relevant resume text** before interpreting.

**Evaluation Criteria**

1. Clarity & Structure (organization, readability)
2. Experience & Impact (responsibilities, measurable results)
3. Skills & Technical Depth (relevance and alignment)
4. Professional Credibility (education, certifications)
5. Evidence-Based Impact (metrics, outcomes)

**Scoring Guide**
1–2 Very weak
3–4 Below average
5–6 Average
7–8 Strong
9–10 Exceptional

**Output**
Resume Evaluation Report
Overall Score: X/10


Strictly the output should be "overal score:x"

json.text:
Naveen Kumar Nayakal
nayakalnaveen11@gmail.com +91 6309322414 linkedin.com/in/naveen-nayakal-631462246
Career Objective
A motivated fresher currently working with Cloud and Artificial Intelligence technologies, seeking to transition into a core AI & ML
engineering role focused on systems, compiler frameworks, and high-performance computing. Passionate about Artificial
Intelligence, mathematics, and low-level optimization, with strong foundation in Java and logical problem-solving. Aspiring to
contribute to compiler-level AI infrastructure, optimized execution graphs, and scalable model performance through continuous
learning, research-driven development, and collaboration with advanced AI systems teams.
Professional Experience
Cloud AI Engineer
Kyndryl
•Managed and monitored installed systems for highest level of availability.
•Proven ability to learn quickly and adapt to new situations.
•Learned and adapted quickly to new technology and software applications.
•Skilled at working independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
•Paid attention to detail while completing assignments.
•Streamlined deployment processes for increased efficiency and reduced downtime.
•Reduced time-to-market, automating build, test, and deployment pipelines using CI/CD tools.
•Established effective communication channels between development and operations teams for smoother integration of tasks.
•Mentored junior team members on DevOps concepts, best practices, tools usage and helped them ramp up quickly on the projects.
•Compiled, cleaned and manipulated data for proper handling.
•Analyzed large datasets to identify trends and patterns in customer behaviors.
Education
Secured CGPA of 8.20
2020-2024 | BTech in CSE , GITAM University
Certificates
Java programming issued by Great Learning.
AZ-900: Azure Cloud Fundamentals
Azure AI Fundamentals
AZ-104: Azure Associate Administrator
Projects
AI SRE Dashboard
•Cleaned and pre-processed 86,000 incident tickets to train for the ML model.
•Tested with multiple ML models for data feeding and training to choose the best working model.
•Build a complete end-to-end data pipeline for the AI SRE Dashboard
Pro-active AI Incident Prediction and Decisioning Application
•Trained and tested multiple models like LightGBM, XGBoost and LSTM.
•Trained a model for classification and forecasting Incidents.
•Used Azure functions to automate the resolution steps for incidents.
Extra Curricular Activities
POC for Football League
•Led end-to-end execution of a company-wide football league as POC and Volunteer Lead, managing 17 teams and 120 players.
•Owned planning, scheduling, and resource coordination by designing structured workflows for smooth operations.
•Made real-time, data-driven decisions to resolve constraints and on-ground challenges under pressure.
Marketing Head for Anime Club
•Led the promotion and marketing strategies for the club, driving increased membership and event participation
•Organized and co-ordinated various marketing campaigns, including social media outreach, poster design, and event planning
